name: graph_store_am
abstract: Native adjacency-list graph store for PostgreSQL (TriDB tri-modal substrate)
description: A WAL-logged, MVCC-visible adjacency-list graph access method: typed + directional edges, dense vertex ids with an external-id map, streaming TR-1 traversals (gph_traverse, gph_traverse_typed, gph_traverse_bfs), tombstone deletes and freeze. One transaction manager, one WAL — the graph leg of TriDB's tri-modal (vector + graph + relational) architecture; pairs with pgvector for the vector leg.
